user.title: EU Power Prices
user.description: Enter your EU Power Prices API key. You'll choose a market area next.

area.title: Select market area
area.description: Choose the bidding zone to track. If yours isn't listed, type the code directly.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate EU Power Prices
reauth_confirm.description: Your API key was rejected. Enter a new one to keep this area working.

error.invalid_area: That area code wasn't recognized by the API.
error.cannot_connect: Couldn't reach the EU Power Prices API. Please try again.
